---
title: "Dacca Report (Global Search)"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
jupyter: python3
execute:
  daemon: false
---

```{python}
# | label: setup
# | echo: false
import os
import logging

# Hide the noisy JAX CUDA initialization error on machines without a GPU
logging.getLogger("jax._src.xla_bridge").setLevel(logging.CRITICAL)
import pickle

from datetime import datetime

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from plotnine import *
from IPython.display import display

import pypomp as pp
import jax

# When rendering, run from dacca/performance so PKL_PATH resolves
print(datetime.now())
```

```{python}
# | label: load-data
# | echo: false
pomp_obj = pickle.load(open("mif_results/dacca_results_rl4.pkl", "rb"))
pomp_obj_train = pickle.load(open("dmop_results/dacca_results_rl4.pkl", "rb"))
LL_frame = pomp_obj.results()
traces_raw_gpu = pomp_obj.traces()
traces_raw_gpu["source"] = "gpu"
traces_raw_train = pomp_obj_train.traces()
traces_raw_train["source"] = "train"
traces_raw = pd.concat([traces_raw_gpu, traces_raw_train], ignore_index=True)
```

# Individual results

```{python}
# | label: traces-long
# | echo: false
# Build long-format traces (equivalent to R pivot_longer)
traces = traces_raw.rename(
    columns={"theta_idx": "rep", "iteration": "iter", "loglik": "logLik"}
)
id_cols = ["rep", "iter", "logLik", "method", "source"]
param_cols = [c for c in traces.columns if c not in id_cols and c not in ["c", "omega", "rho"]]
traces_long = traces.melt(
    id_vars=id_cols,
    value_vars=param_cols,
    var_name="quantity",
    value_name="param_value",
)
```

## Summary results

### IF2 only
```{python}
# | label: summary-if2
# | echo: false
pomp_obj.print_metadata()
pomp_obj.print_summary()
```

### IF2 + train
```{python}
# | label: summary-if2-train
# | echo: false
pomp_obj_train.print_metadata()
pomp_obj_train.print_summary()
```

## LogLik Summary Statistics

### Final pfilter logLik by source
```{python}
# | label: loglik-summary-stats
# | echo: false
# Get final pfilter logLik for each replicate by source
pfilter_traces = traces[traces["method"] == "pfilter"]
last_pfilter_iter = pfilter_traces.groupby(["rep", "source"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_pfilter_loglik = pfilter_traces.loc[
    pfilter_traces["iter"] == last_pfilter_iter, ["rep", "source", "logLik"]
].drop_duplicates(subset=["rep", "source"])

# Compute summary statistics grouped by source
loglik_summary = (
    final_pfilter_loglik.groupby("source")["logLik"]
    .agg(["count", "mean", "std", "min", "median", "max"])
    .round(2)
    .reset_index()
)
loglik_summary.columns = ["Source", "N", "Mean", "Std", "Min", "Median", "Max"]
print(loglik_summary.to_string(index=False))
```

## Times

### IF2 only
```{python}
# | label: time-summary
# | echo: false
time_df = pomp_obj.time()
print(time_df)
print("Total time: ", time_df["time"].sum())
```

### IF2 + train
```{python}
# | label: time-summary-train
# | echo: false
time_df = pomp_obj_train.time()
print(time_df)
print("Total time: ", time_df["time"].sum())
```

## IF2 only traces

```{python}
# | label: plot-traces
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 7
# | echo: false
traces_long_gpu = traces_long[traces_long["source"] == "gpu"].copy()
quantities = sorted(traces_long_gpu["quantity"].unique())

for i in range(0, len(quantities), 4):
    q_subset = quantities[i:i+4]
    p = (
        ggplot(
            traces_long_gpu[traces_long_gpu["quantity"].isin(q_subset)],
            aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"),
        )
        + geom_line(show_legend=False)
        + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free_y", ncol=2)
        + scale_y_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
        + theme(axis_text_y=element_text(size=8))
        + labs(title=f"IF2 only traces (Part {i//4 + 1})")
    )
    display(p)
```

```{python}
# | label: plot-ll-traces
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false
traces_ll = traces[traces["source"] == "gpu"][["rep", "iter", "logLik"]].copy()
(
    ggplot(traces_ll, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"))
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    # + coord_cartesian(ylim=(-4000, None))
    + labs(title="IF2 only logLik traces")
)
```

## IF2 + train traces

```{python}
# | label: plot-traces-train
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 7
# | echo: false
traces_long_train = traces_long[traces_long["source"] == "train"].copy()
quantities = sorted(traces_long_train["quantity"].unique())

for i in range(0, len(quantities), 4):
    q_subset = quantities[i:i+4]
    p = (
        ggplot(
            traces_long_train[traces_long_train["quantity"].isin(q_subset)],
            aes(x="iter", y="param_value", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"),
        )
        + geom_line(show_legend=False)
        + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free_y", ncol=2)
        + scale_y_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
        + theme(axis_text_y=element_text(size=8))
        + labs(title=f"IF2 + DMOP traces (Part {i//4 + 1})")
    )
    display(p)
```


```{python}
# | label: plot-ll-traces-train
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 6
# | echo: false
traces_ll = traces[traces["source"] == "train"][["rep", "iter", "logLik"]].copy()
(
    ggplot(traces_ll, aes(x="iter", y="logLik", group="rep", color="factor(rep)"))
    + geom_line(show_legend=False)
    + coord_cartesian(ylim=(-4000, None))
    + labs(title="IF2 + DMOP logLik traces")
)
```

# Comparison: IF2 vs. DMOP

## LogLik (density)

```{python}
# | label: final-loglik
# | echo: false
pfilter_traces = traces_long[traces_long["method"] == "pfilter"]
last_pfilter_iter = pfilter_traces.groupby(["rep", "source"])["iter"].transform("max")
final_loglik = pfilter_traces.loc[
    pfilter_traces["iter"] == last_pfilter_iter, ["rep", "source", "logLik"]
].drop_duplicates(subset=["rep", "source"])
```

```{python}
# | label: plot-ll-density
# | fig-width: 8
# | fig-height: 5
# | echo: false

outliers = final_loglik[final_loglik["logLik"] < -3800]
if not outliers.empty:
    print("Values filtered out (logLik < -3800):")
    print(outliers.to_string(index=False))

final_loglik_filtered = final_loglik[final_loglik["logLik"] >= -3800].copy()

p_ll = (
    ggplot(
        final_loglik_filtered.replace({"source": {"gpu": "IF2", "train": "IFAD"}}),
        aes(x="source", y="logLik", fill="source", color="source"),
    )
    + geom_boxplot(alpha=0.2, outlier_alpha=0, show_legend=False)
    + geom_jitter(width=0.2, alpha=0.5, show_legend=False)
    + labs(x="", y="logLik", title="Final logLik: IF2 vs. IFAD")
    + theme_minimal()
    # + coord_cartesian(ylim=(-3800, None))
)
p_ll.save("../../imgs/ll_boxplot_global.pdf", width=6, height=6, verbose=False)
p_ll
```

## Final parameter estimates (density)

```{python}
# | label: final-params
# | echo: false
last_iter_by_source = traces_long.groupby("source")["iter"].transform("max")
final_params = traces_long[traces_long["iter"] == last_iter_by_source].copy()

default_theta = pp.models.dacca().theta[0]
default_params_df = pd.DataFrame([default_theta]).melt(
    var_name="quantity", value_name="default_value"
)
```

```{python}
# | label: plot-param-density
# | fig-width: 10
# | fig-height: 7
# | echo: false
quantities = sorted(final_params["quantity"].unique())

for i in range(0, len(quantities), 4):
    q_subset = quantities[i : i + 4]
    p = (
        ggplot(
            final_params[final_params["quantity"].isin(q_subset)].replace(
                {"source": {"gpu": "IF2", "train": "DMOP"}}
            ),
            aes(x="param_value", fill="source", color="source"),
        )
        + geom_density(alpha=0.4)
        + geom_vline(
            default_params_df[default_params_df["quantity"].isin(q_subset)],
            aes(xintercept="default_value"),
            color="red",
            linetype="dotted",
            size=1,
            inherit_aes=False,
        )
        + facet_wrap("quantity", scales="free", ncol=2)
        + scale_x_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
        + scale_y_continuous(labels=lambda l: [f"{x:g}" for x in l])
        + theme(axis_text_x=element_text(size=8), axis_text_y=element_text(size=8))
        + labs(
            x="estimate",
            title=f"Final parameter estimates: IF2 vs. DMOP (Part {i // 4 + 1})",
        )
    )
    display(p)
```
